name: 5 Deuce Hoover Gangster Crips
description: Videos 52 Hoover Gangster Crips Full Name: 52 Hoover Gangster Crips Also Known As: 5-Deuce Hoover Gangster Crips Founded: 1970s Place of Origin: South Los Angeles, California Ethnicity: African-American Affiliation: Gangster Crips Parent Organization: Hoover Criminals Colors: Blue And Orange Status: Active The 52 Hoover Gangster Crips (52 HGC), also known as the Five-Deuce Hoover Gangster Crips, are an African-American street gang based in South Los Angeles, California.
